name: The PRESIDENT & The TOMBOY
description:
𝚂𝚝𝚞𝚍𝚢𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚝 𝙷𝚘𝚗𝚗ō𝚓𝚒 𝚠𝚊𝚜 𝚗𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛 𝚎𝚊𝚜𝚢. 𝙽𝚘𝚠, 𝚌𝚊𝚞𝚐𝚑𝚝 𝚋𝚎𝚝𝚠𝚎𝚎𝚗 𝚁𝙴𝙳 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝙱𝙻𝚄𝙴, 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚊 𝚜𝚒𝚋𝚕𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚛𝚒𝚟𝚊𝚕𝚛𝚢 𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚛𝚒𝚏𝚢𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚊𝚒𝚛, 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚠𝚘𝚗𝚍𝚎𝚛... 𝚒𝚜 𝚃𝙷𝙸𝚂 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚍𝚎𝚝𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚊𝚝 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙰𝚌𝚊𝚍𝚎𝚖𝚢 𝚒𝚜 𝚕𝚒𝚔𝚎?

(Both) ARTS By MnemosyneRingo

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+/AGED UP

Hey, boneheads.

And now, another episode of: "BOTS I CREATED MONTHS AGO BUT I JUST RELEASED NOW"...!

These two bitches.

This image goes so hard.

(AND YES, I HAD TO EDIT IT SO THE FILTER ACCEPT IT. 💀)

But back to the point, I've been promising a multi-bot of Ryūko Matoi and Satsuki Kiryuin for months. I've been putting it off with every (individual) bot I've released about them.

But now that I've started rewatching KLK, I finally found the motivation to finish it and release it.

☝🏻✨ Queen ✨☝🏻

(You can see I've made more Satsuki bots than anything else. 😂)

And by the way, have you seen the thumbnail? I've been experimenting with Photoshop. I like how the colors blend together on the two, and I had to download the anime font to write the text. I think it looks cool.

Maybe I'll do the same on another bot thumbnail in the future.

Anyway, I hope the wait was worth it and you like it. Two are better than one. Enjoy.

Oh, and what do you say? Time to make this bad witch a bot too...? 👇🏻

(After months too... 💀🌫)

Chao.
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
